include_directories(${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/include)
include_directories(${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/include)
add_subdirectory(include)
add_subdirectory(lib)
if(TRITON_BUILD_PYTHON_MODULE)
  set(_proton_extra_libs "")
  if(TRITON_BUILD_NVIDIA_BACKEND)
    list(APPEND _proton_extra_libs ProtonNVIDIAGPUToLLVM)
  endif()
  if(TRITON_BUILD_AMD_BACKEND)
    list(APPEND _proton_extra_libs ProtonAMDGPUToLLVM)
  endif()
  add_triton_plugin(TritonProton ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/triton_proton.cc LINK_LIBS ProtonToProtonGPU ProtonGPUToLLVM ${_proton_extra_libs} ProtonAnalysis)
  target_link_libraries(TritonProton PRIVATE Python3::Module pybind11::headers)
  if(TRITON_BUILD_NVIDIA_BACKEND)
    target_compile_definitions(TritonProton PRIVATE TRITON_BUILD_NVIDIA_BACKEND)
  endif()
  if(TRITON_BUILD_AMD_BACKEND)
    target_compile_definitions(TritonProton PRIVATE TRITON_BUILD_AMD_BACKEND)
  endif()
endif()
